heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about the methods and types discussed in this
guide, see the following API documentation:

- [MongoClient](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html)

- [OIDCCallbackParams](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/OIDCCallbackParams.html)

- [OIDCResponse](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/OIDCResponse.html)
